## Summary

Describe the problem and the implemented solution.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Dependency update

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:package`

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated relevant tests.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] I avoided unrelated changes.
- [ ] I did not include credentials or private data.
- [ ] This change is compatible with Node.js 22 and 24.
